name: audio_translation_create
description: Translate audio from any supported language into English text using the Whisper model.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The audio file to translate. Supported formats: mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Optional text to guide the model's style.

request_example.body: multipart/form-data with file and model fields

body.text: Hello, my name is Wolfgang and I come from Germany.
